conventions_srcmiddleware_626369879218.content: Always write tests first (TDD) following existing test patterns like csrf-middleware.test.ts — same directory structure and mocking style.

thoughts_plan_writing_626371351618.content: The Write tool requires explicit permission before writing plan files — taskify agents may fail silently or halt if this permission isn't pre-granted.

facts_srcmiddlewareratelimitts_626373124.content: Fixed-window rate limiter in rateLimit.ts is a separate implementation from the existing sliding-window rate-limiter.ts — not a replacement, both coexist.

facts_srcmiddlewareratelimitts_626374737.content: Use existing rate-limiter.ts as a reference for IP resolution (byIp), whitelist/blacklist logic, and header conventions (X-RateLimit-*, Retry-After).

thoughts_kody_pipeline_799987571435.content: @kody full committed only skill docs; the actual implementation files (src/middleware/rateLimit.ts, rateLimit.test.ts) were never created. A FAIL verdict means the required source files are absent.

facts_kody_pipeline_799990205834.content: When a pipeline stage ends in FAIL, the agent must examine the actual diff (not assumptions) to determine whether required source files were written — build stages that pass on skill-doc-only commits

conventions_srcmiddleware_799992002199.content: Source files that a task explicitly requires (e.g., src/middleware/rateLimit.ts) must exist in the repository; pipeline state/artifact updates alone do not satisfy task requirements.

thoughts_pipelineexecution_870520159145.content: The agent updated skill documentation files instead of writing the required implementation. No actual code was committed.

thoughts_pipelinepermissions_87052158845.content: Plan file could not be written to disk due to missing Write tool permission — this blocked plan-phase progression.

facts_srcmiddleware_870523411063.content: No src/middleware/ directory exists in this repository; a new directory would need to be created as part of the implementation.

thoughts_pipeline_stages_910319466023.content: Build/tool stages may pass on skill-doc-only commits even when required source files are absent; only review stages catch the delta.

thoughts_pipeline_stages_910320810974.content: Same failure mode recurred: skill docs + pipeline state files committed, zero source files created.

facts_review_910322158821.content: Review stage validates actual source file presence in the commit diff, not just build/tool success.

thoughts_pipeline_execution_987524200155.content: When Write permission is denied mid-pipeline, the agent committed skill docs + pipeline state instead of the required implementation files. The task silently failed without surfacing the permission er

facts_pipeline_execution_987525989117.content: A failed plan-write (permission denied) led to a silent FAIL rather than surfacing the error — the root cause was masked by the pipeline state commit.

facts_pipeline_gating_987527426972.content: Taskify correctly identified that the Write tool needs explicit permission grants; this should block the build stage from running if the plan was never written.

thoughts_gitpipeline_1049862161763.content: A commit with only skill docs, references, and pipeline state files contains zero implementation code — the actual task was not done.

facts_verification_1049864182098.content: 'Success' verification requires actual source files (e.g. src/middleware/rateLimit.ts) to exist in the repo, not just pipeline/artifact state.

facts_agentbehavior_1049866706678.content: This failure mode was flagged in a prior review, indicating the agent repeated the same mistake across pipeline runs.
